hypothesis: On XAUUSD M15, a 3-bar Bollinger Band rejection pattern (prior bar inside, middle bar pierces band, current bar closes back inside) signals exhaustion and reverts with a favorable asymmetric R:R of ~2.5:1, producing PF>=2.0 over 200+ trades when ADX is low.

entry_rules.long: close[2] > lower_bb[2] AND low[1] <= lower_bb[1] AND close[0] > lower_bb[0] AND adx(14) < 25
entry_rules.short: close[2] < upper_bb[2] AND high[1] >= upper_bb[1] AND close[0] < upper_bb[0] AND adx(14) < 25

exit_rules.stop_loss: 1.0 * atr(14) below pattern low (long) / above pattern high (short)
exit_rules.early_exit: close on touch of opposite BB

notes: Inspired by BB Gold Scalper. Uses ATR-scaled SL/TP instead of fixed pips to avoid the point-size mismatch failure seen in gen 32.
